name: initial_coze_openapi_endpoint_selection
description: Recommended initial endpoint subset for a future Coze plugin import.

endpoints.safety_notes: Health response contains service status only.

endpoints.purpose: Create a task and return task_id.
Register metadata or count matrix input by safe relative path.
endpoints.safety_notes: Reject local absolute paths and path traversal.

endpoints.purpose: Run the minimal workflow or request DESeq2 when preflight is ready.
endpoints.safety_notes: Uses registered task inputs and preserves existing response shape.
Returns task status and message only.

endpoints.purpose: Fetch the safe structured result summary for Coze presentation.
endpoints.safety_notes: Uses relative artifact download paths and documented limitations.
Lists safe relative artifact paths only.
Rejects arbitrary filesystem reads and unknown artifact names.

endpoints.purpose: Check R, Rscript, BiocManager, and DESeq2 readiness before DESeq2.
endpoints.safety_notes: Does not run differential expression analysis.
